channel.title: Github-Mobile on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Github-Mobile on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Remote control for Copilot CLI sessions now generally available on mobile, web, and VS Code
item.description:
Remote control for Copilot CLI sessions is now generally available on GitHub Mobile and github.com, with support also referenced for VS Code. It lets you start work in the terminal and continue managing the session from mobile or web.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Create repositories on the go with GitHub Mobile
item.description:
GitHub Mobile now supports creating new repositories directly in the app. On iOS, you can start from Home or Profile, tap the + button, and select Create repository.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Mobile: Research and code with Copilot cloud agent anywhere
item.description:
GitHub Mobile now supports Copilot cloud agent beyond pull request workflows, letting users continue work away from their desk. The update adds the ability to ask Copilot to research and code from mobile.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Mobile: Stay in flow with a refreshed Copilot tab and native session logs
item.description:
GitHub Mobile now includes a refreshed Copilot tab, native session logs, and additional in-app controls for agent sessions. The update is aimed at making it easier to manage agentic workflows from the mobile app.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Mobile: Faster, more flexible agent assignment from issues
item.description:
GitHub Mobile adds an Assign an Agent option in the issue overflow menu, making it faster to delegate work from an issue. The update is focused on quicker access to agent assignment and more flexible delegation from mobile.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: A smoother navigation experience in GitHub Mobile for Android
item.description:
GitHub Mobile for Android has updated its navigation to be more consistent and intuitive across the app. The change focuses on smoother movement between key areas like Home and other main sections.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Mobile: Track coding agent progress in real time with Live Notifications
item.description:
GitHub Mobile now supports Live Coding Agent Notifications to monitor Copilot coding agent activity and supported third-party agent sessions in real time from the mobile app.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GPT-5.3-Codex is now available in github.com, GitHub Mobile, and Visual Studio
item.description:
GPT-5.3-Codex is generally available for GitHub Copilot paid tiers and can be used via Copilot Chat across github.com, GitHub Mobile, and Visual Studio.

  • Source: GitHub
